caption:
A missed call doesn't just cost you the job.

It costs you a review too.

Angry callers rarely stay quiet. They open Google, tell the story their way, and the next customer reads it before they ever call you.

Run this test this week: have a friend or family member (not you) call your main line at 2pm on a busy day. Count the rings before it hits voicemail. Note if any text follows, and how fast.

Most shops find the same gap: no answer, no text, no second chance.

The fix is a missed-call auto-text that fires in under 60 seconds and asks what the caller needs, before they dial the next name on the list.

Want this running on your business line this week?

DM "MISSED"

#ServiceBusiness #MissedCalls #HomeServices #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessMarketing
rationale: Removes the fabricated statistic and replaces it with a logically airtight mechanism (unanswered call to public review) that needs no unverifiable data to land. The self-audit stays realistic (a friend tests the line, not the owner), the fix is concrete and immediate, and the caption is fully scannable with a single clear CTA.
